title: Focus with a Ref
description:
Clicking "Focus the input" should move the cursor into the text box. Right now the button does nothing because there's no reference to the input element.

Use `useRef` to get a handle on the input, attach it with `ref={...}`, and on click call `ref.current.focus()`.
objectives: Create a ref with `const inputRef = React.useRef(null)`
hints: `useRef` gives you a mutable container whose `.current` survives re-renders.
Attaching `ref={inputRef}` to a DOM element sets `inputRef.current` to that element.
Imperative DOM actions like `.focus()` go through the ref: `inputRef.current.focus()`.

checks.description: Attaches the ref to the input
